subject: cookies()
truth: Stop calling cookies() synchronously; await it with const cookieStore = await cookies().
quote: cookies() is now asynchronous and must be awaited: const cookieStore = await cookies().

subject: headers()
truth: Stop calling headers() synchronously; await it with const headersList = await headers().
quote: headers() is now asynchronous and must be awaited: const headersList = await headers().

subject: draftMode()
truth: Stop calling draftMode() synchronously; await it with const { isEnabled } = await draftMode().
quote: draftMode() is now asynchronous and must be awaited: const { isEnabled } = await draftMode().

subject: params in layout.js, page.js, route.js
truth: Stop accessing params as a synchronous object; await it with const { slug } = await params.
quote: params in layout.js, page.js, and route.js is now a Promise and must be awaited: const { slug } = await params.

subject: searchParams in page.js
truth: Stop accessing searchParams synchronously; await it with const { query } = await searchParams.
quote: searchParams in page.js is now a Promise and must be awaited: const { query } = await searchParams.

subject: fetch() caching default
truth: Stop relying on fetch() being cached by default; opt in with fetch(url, { cache: 'force-cache' }).
quote: fetch() requests are no longer cached by default; opt in with fetch(url, { cache: 'force-cache' }).

subject: GET Route Handler caching default
truth: Stop relying on GET Route Handlers being cached by default; opt in with export const dynamic = 'force-static'.
quote: GET functions in Route Handlers are no longer cached by default; opt in with export const dynamic = 'force-static'.

subject: Client Cache on Link/useRouter navigation
old: page segments reused from Client Cache by default
truth: Stop relying on page segments being reused from Client Cache on Link/useRouter navigation; configure with staleTimes.
quote: Page segments are no longer reused from the Client Cache on <Link>/useRouter navigation by default; configure with staleTimes.

from_fact: page segments reused from client cache by default

subject: useFormState
truth: Stop using useFormState; use useActionState from React 19 instead.
quote: useFormState is deprecated; use useActionState from React 19.

subject: @next/font package
truth: Stop importing from @next/font; import from the built-in next/font instead.
quote: The @next/font package is removed; import from the built-in next/font instead.

subject: experimental.bundlePagesExternals
truth: Stop using experimental.bundlePagesExternals; use bundlePagesRouterDependencies instead.
quote: experimental.bundlePagesExternals is now stable and renamed to bundlePagesRouterDependencies.

subject: experimental.serverComponentsExternalPackages
quote: experimental.serverComponentsExternalPackages is now stable and renamed to serverExternalPackages.

subject: runtime segment config value 'experimental-edge'
truth: Stop using runtime: 'experimental-edge'; use runtime: 'edge' instead.
quote: The runtime segment config value experimental-edge is removed; use edge.

subject: geo and ip on NextRequest
truth: Stop accessing geo and ip on NextRequest; use your host's helpers like @vercel/functions geolocation() and ipAddress().
quote: The geo and ip properties on NextRequest are removed; use your host's helpers (e.g. @vercel/functions geolocation/ipAddress).

subject: minimum React version
truth: Stop using React 18; the minimum React version is now 19.
quote: The minimum React version is now 19.
